[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11011111 7
2 11100101 5
3 10111111 7
4 01011010 4
5 11111111 a
6 11011111 7
7 11110101 6

01 10 00111010 4
12 21 01111010 5
23 32 11111101 7
34 43 11101101 6
45 54 11100101 5 match 2
56 65 10101010 4
67 76 01101110 5
70 07 01100110 4

02 20 01111000 4
13 31 11111111 a match 0 5
24 42 11011101 6
35 53 11101101 6
46 64 11001111 6
57 75 11100110 5
60 06 00101010 3
71 17 01111110 6

03 30 11101101 6
14 41 11111111 a match 0 5
25 52 11111000 5
36 63 11101111 7
47 74 11100111 6
50 05 10100000 2
61 16 00111010 4
72 27 01111110 6

04 40 11100101 5 match 2
15 51 10111010 5
26 62 01011010 4 match 4
37 73 11101111 7
